title: Vin (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vin''' was a name shared by:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Vin]]''', a [[Jedi archivist]] at the [[Imperial Palace|Jedi Temple]]
*'''[[Vin Northal]]''', an [[Rebel Alliance Intelligence Service|Alliance Intelligence]] operative undercover in the [[Galactic Empire]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*[[Gavin Darklighter]], who assumed the alias '''Vin Leiger''' during a mission to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
*'''[[Vin Emil]]''', a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]].
*'''[[Vin Freen]]''', the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Ambitious]]''.
*'''[[Vin Kollis]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer stationed on [[Nishr]].
*[[Vin Northal/Legends|'''Vin Northal''']], an [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Imperial Royal Guard]] who defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
*'''[[Vin Nothos]]''', a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the Rebel Alliance.
*'''[[Vin (clone commando)|Vin]]''', a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]].

{{Disambig}}

|de=Vin
}}
